name: St.Shine Optical Co.,Ltd.
summary: St.Shine Optical Co.,Ltd. designs, manufactures, markets, and supplies contact lens in Taiwan and internationally. It offers daily spherical, frequent replacement spherical, aberration control, toric frequent replacement, color, and silicone hydrogel soft contact lens, as well as lathe-cut, cast-molding, and RGP lenses. The company offers its products for myopic and hyperopic patients for the correction of astigmatism. The company was formerly known as First Optical Co., Ltd. and changed its name to St.Shine Optical Co.,Ltd. in 1986. St.Shine Optical Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
